reconfigure.title: Reconfigure MieleLogic
reconfigure.description: Update your credentials or laundry ID. Other settings are preserved.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to MieleLogic API
error.server_error: Server error, please try again later

credentials.title: Update MieleLogic Credentials
credentials.description: Update your login credentials for MieleLogic

data_description.password: Your MieleLogic password (required to verify changes)

calendar.title: Configure Calendar Sync

data_description.enable_sync: Sync reservations to an external calendar (e.g. CalDAV)
data_description.calendar_entity: Select which calendar to sync to

laundry_hours.title: Configure Laundry Opening Hours
laundry_hours.description:
Set when the laundry opens and closes. This is used to display 'Closed until XX:XX' on machines.

Current: Opens {current_opening}, Closes {current_closing}

data_description.opening_time: When does the laundry open (format: HH:MM)
data_description.closing_time: When does the laundry close (format: HH:MM)

machine_config.title: Configure Primary Machines
machine_config.description:
Select which machine is used for API calls for each laundry house.

Current: Klatvask machine {current_klatvask}, Storvask machine {current_storvask}

time_slots.title: Configure Time Slots
time_slots.description: Manage fixed time slots for each laundry house.

edit_storvask_slots.title: Edit Storvask Time Slots
edit_storvask_slots.description: Add or delete time slots for Storvask.

edit_klatvask_slots.title: Edit Klatvask Time Slots
edit_klatvask_slots.description: Add or delete time slots for Klatvask.

add_storvask_slot.title: Add Storvask Time Slot
add_storvask_slot.description:
Enter start and end time for the new time slot.
Format: HH:MM (e.g. 07:00 or 19:30)

add_klatvask_slot.title: Add Klatvask Time Slot
add_klatvask_slot.description:
Enter start and end time for the new time slot.
Format: HH:MM (e.g. 07:00 or 19:30)

panel.title: Panel Settings
panel.description: Configure the MieleLogic sidebar panel. Changes take effect immediately without restart.

data_description.panel_enabled: Enable or disable the MieleLogic panel in the sidebar
data_description.sidebar_title: The title shown in the sidebar navigation
data_description.sidebar_icon: Material Design Icon for the sidebar (e.g. mdi:washing-machine)
data_description.require_admin: Only show the panel to admin users

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to MieleLogic API
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials - check username and password
error.server_error: Server error, please try again later
error.calendar_not_found: Selected calendar not found - check that it is still configured
error.end_before_start: End time must be after start time
error.slot_overlap: Time slots must not overlap with existing slots
